name: @fintech-portfolio/data-access-auth
description: Auth data-access layer for clearline-web: the in-memory access-token store and the login TanStack Query mutation. No UI, no business rules — those live in libs/ui and libs/domain/auth respectively.

metadata.scope: First lib in the plan's libs/data-access/* group. accessTokenStore is a plain module-scoped variable — deliberately not React state, not localStorage/sessionStorage — the literal 'in memory only' requirement from US-CW-001.
